hero.title: Verifiable Policy. Uncompromised Access.
hero.subtitle: We provide architectural oversight and deep programmatic Subject Matter Expertise (SME) for highly regulated government systems. We predict cascading downstream effects before they happen, ensuring complex programmatic changes are accurately translated into deterministic code that passes federal audits.

challenge.label: The Modernization Trap
challenge.title: Systems Built for Compliance.
challenge.text: State agencies spent millions moving to the cloud, but the resulting platforms are often too rigid to adapt to new rules. We do not write code; we ensure programmatic changes are accurately translated into deterministic system logic. We combine deep SME with strict engineering oversight to predict cascading downstream effects, prevent automated errors, and stop federal audit fines.
challenge.solution: We deploy clear policy engineering, rigid procurement rules, and frontline change management to force accountability—whether your system is built by a prime vendor or an in-house IT team—and legally secure your infrastructure.

infrastructure.label: Holistic Oversight
infrastructure.title: Architectural Oversight & SME.
infrastructure.text: We deploy strict technical rules informed by cross-program expertise to ensure systemic changes do not trigger automated federal penalties.

sandbox.label: Simulator 01
sandbox.title: Automated Policy Testing
sandbox.text: See how we use mathematical logic to verify legislative changes and predict downstream blast radiuses before they reach production code.

manual.label: Simulator 02
manual.title: The Time Tax Audit
manual.text: See how we measure the exact administrative burden placed on residents to legally defend your state's policy choices.

extraction.label: Simulator 03
extraction.title: Immutable Appeal Records
extraction.text: See how we freeze system data to create an unquestionable, secure record for legal appeals and fair hearings.

hero.label: Capabilities
hero.title: Architectural Oversight & Policy Engineering
hero.subtitle: We provide targeted engineering oversight and wide-lens SME capabilities to ensure programmatic changes are translated flawlessly into code without triggering catastrophic cross-program errors.

statutory.title: Verifiable Policy & Downstream Prediction
statutory.text: We bridge the gap between policy intent and system logic. We ensure your codebase accurately reflects the law, whether built by a massive vendor or an internal state team. We mathematically verify that new rules won't trigger cascading downstream errors in interconnected programs, defending you against unfunded federal mandates.

rulesEngine.title: AI Governance & Secure Infrastructure
rulesEngine.text: We write the administrative law to legally bind and control AI deployments. We mandate strict architectural boundaries to protect sensitive IRS and HIPAA data, ensuring new automation tools act as caseworker aids, not unverified, probabilistic decision engines.

sanction.title: System Accountability & Smart Procurement
sanction.text: We force engineering accountability. We write strict technical rules for your RFPs and internal IT charters to prevent massive vendors or isolated internal teams from creating unmaintainable legacy code. We help fund this oversight by braiding federal grants with civic philanthropy.

data.title: Frontline Operations & Workforce Design
data.text: Even perfectly translated code fails if caseworkers cannot use it. We engineer operational procedures around the people who actually do the work, eliminating volunteer dependency and building professional, empowered state workforces.

sprint.title: Targeted Architectural Interventions
sprint.text: Rapid oversight deployments to diagnose structural logic flaws, map downstream dependencies, and verify that complex policy is accurately coded into live government systems.

advisory.title: Technical Expert Advisory
advisory.text: Long-term partnership acting as the State's technical referee, predicting cross-system downstream effects, and pre-testing new policies before production.

integration.title: System Procurement & Blueprinting
integration.text: End-to-end consulting to write the strict technical rules of massive state RFPs or internal builds, ensuring programmatic changes execute deterministically.

hero.label: Research
hero.title: Threat Intelligence & Diagnostics
hero.subtitle: Clear analysis on why government tech fails, how unverified code triggers downstream penalties, and how to survive federal audits.

adv1.title: Predicting Cross-Program Blast Radiuses
adv1.desc: Why isolated code changes trigger massive federal variances, and how wide-lens SME prevents cascading errors.

adv2.title: Protecting Data with Secure Gateways
adv2.desc: The severe risks of using commercial cloud platforms for state benefits, and how to mandate secure alternatives.

adv3.title: Translating Policy to Deterministic Code
adv3.desc: Why standard software testing fails government systems, and how to mathematically simulate programmatic changes.

adv4.title: Ending Volunteer Dependency
adv4.desc: Why states must stop relying on volunteers to deliver benefits, and how to build a professional state workforce.

adv5.title: Fighting Federal Payment Penalties
adv5.desc: How state agencies can reconstruct system data to prove structural logic flaws and successfully fight federal audit fines.

adv6.title: Defeating Tech Debt & Vendor Lock-In
adv6.desc: How bad procurement and isolated IT teams exploit vague rules, and how to mandate strict engineering boundaries.

founder.title: Founder Dossier
founder.intro: We provide the architectural oversight and wide-lens programmatic SME required to ensure state policy is flawlessly translated into deterministic system code.
founder.p1: Applied Policy Systems was established to guide state agencies out of the 'Modernization Trap.' States spent hundreds of millions moving to the cloud, only to realize their systems are blind to cross-program downstream effects, triggering massive federal audits.
founder.p2: We act as the ultimate strategic failsafe for State CIOs and Agency Directors. We leverage our unique scope of programmatic experience to predict the cascading effects that isolated IT teams and vendors miss, ensuring your infrastructure is accurate, accountable, and legally secure.

m2.title: The Modernization Trap
